mechanism_narrative: A sustained low federal funds rate reduces equity discount rates, compressing valuation multiples and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: An unemployment rate falling below 7.0 percent signals labor market tightening that increases corporate earnings expectations and drives positive equity returns over a quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are negative in greater than 55 percent of instances when UNRATE crosses below 7.0 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous month-over-month expansion in retail sales and housing starts indicates broad consumer demand recovery, which directly lifts corporate revenues and generates positive S&P 500 returns.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in RSAFS and HOUST fails to produce positive 20-day returns in greater than 60 percent of cases.

mechanism_narrative: A month-over-month decline in the index of industrial production signals immediate supply-side contraction, triggering short-term risk-off positioning and negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Five-day forward returns remain positive in greater than 50 percent of months following an INDPRO decline.

mechanism_narrative: Sustained consumer price index growth above 2.5 percent triggers expectations of monetary tightening, compressing equity multiples and generating negative forward returns.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns occur in greater than 65 percent of periods where CPIAUCSL exceeds 2.5 percent.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between rising total employment and falling unemployment rate confirms genuine labor market absorption, supporting sustained earnings growth and positive quarterly equity returns.
failure_condition: Sixty-day forward returns are negative in greater than 55 percent of periods exhibiting this divergence.

mechanism_narrative: Higher quarterly GDP growth directly correlates with improved corporate profit margins, creating a persistent positive drift in equity prices over short trading horizons.
failure_condition: Rank IC for GDPC1 against 5-day forward returns falls below 0.01 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When industrial production falls below its 12-month moving average, it signals a supply-side recessionary shock that forces immediate equity deleveraging and negative returns.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in greater than 60 percent of instances when INDPRO crosses below its 12-month average.
